bestiary.name: Three Knots — Starter Bestiary
bestiary.author: Three Knots Project
bestiary.description: A starter set of low-to-mid-tier monsters for B/X-flavored dungeon play — undead, humanoid raiders, and a pair of common wilderness threats. Module-unique foes (Tomb Guardian, Dead King) live in the module_bestiary on module_village_three_knots.json.

skeleton_warrior.name: Skeleton Warrior
skeleton_warrior.description: A rattling soldier of dead bone in rusted mail, clutching a shortsword it still remembers how to swing.

special_abilities.name: Mindless
special_abilities.description: Cannot be charmed, frightened, or turned by deception. Fights until destroyed.

skeleton_warrior.behavior: Attacks on sight. Does not negotiate. Does not flee.
skeleton_warrior.tactics: Melee only. Moves toward the nearest living creature and swings until broken.

zombie.name: Zombie
zombie.description: A shambling corpse, slow and reeking. Its eyes are dull; its hands are not.

special_abilities.name: Slow
special_abilities.description: Moves at half speed; acts last in any round it is standing.

special_abilities.name: Mindless
special_abilities.description: Cannot be charmed, frightened, or reasoned with.

zombie.behavior: Mindless hunger. Pursues the living until destroyed or left behind.
zombie.tactics: Walks forward. Swings heavily. The trick is to keep moving.

goblin.name: Goblin
goblin.description: A small green-skinned raider with a cruel grin and a stolen knife.
goblin.behavior: Cowardly. Fights in groups. Flees when outnumbered or bloodied.
goblin.tactics: Prefers ranged shots from cover. Melees only when it has numbers.

giant_rat.name: Giant Rat
giant_rat.description: A dog-sized rat with matted fur and yellowed teeth. It watches the torchlight with bad intent.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.on_hit: On a successful bite, the target must save vs. Death or contract filth fever at the GM's discretion — sickened for 1d6 days, halving natural healing.

giant_rat.behavior: Opportunistic. Fights for food or territory; breaks and runs easily.
giant_rat.tactics: Swarms in groups; a lone rat bites once and retreats.

bandit.name: Bandit
bandit.description: A hungry road-thief in patched leathers, sword dulled from use and disuse in equal measure.
bandit.behavior: Will parley for gold. Fights to take valuables, not to the death.
bandit.tactics: Shoots first, melees when pressed. Flees when a companion falls.

wolf.name: Wolf
wolf.description: A lean grey wolf, hollow-ribbed from a hard winter.

special_abilities.name: Pack Tactics
special_abilities.description: +2 to attack rolls while at least one other wolf threatens the same target.

wolf.behavior: Hunts in packs. A lone wolf is probably starving and desperate.
wolf.tactics: Circles, snaps, retreats. Goes for the weakest-looking target.

ghoul.name: Ghoul
ghoul.description: A gaunt undead figure with too-long fingers and yellowed eyes. It remembers being hungry.

attacks.name: Claw
attacks.on_hit: On a successful claw, the target must save vs. Paralysis. On a failed save, the target is paralyzed for 2d4 turns — helpless, all attacks against it hit automatically.

special_abilities.name: Mindless
special_abilities.description: Cannot be charmed or reasoned with.

ghoul.behavior: Ambush predator. Lunges from tomb shadows at anything warm.
ghoul.tactics: Uses the paralyzing claw first, then feeds at leisure. Multiple ghouls coordinate.

giant_spider.name: Giant Spider
giant_spider.description: A pony-sized spider with black eyes and a venom that drops men as cleanly as any blade.

attacks.name: Bite
attacks.on_hit: On a successful bite, the target must save vs. Death or take an additional 2d6 poison damage as the venom works through them.

special_abilities.name: Web Walker
special_abilities.description: Moves freely across its own webs and treats webs in the environment as clear terrain.

giant_spider.behavior: Territorial. Ambushes from webs on ceilings and walls.
giant_spider.tactics: Drops on the nearest target. Bites once, then retreats to wait for the venom to work.
